answeredQuestions.core-problem: Long conversation threads replay full history without budget control, causing quality, cost, and latency risks.
answeredQuestions.solution-approach: Per-conversation context budgeting with rolling summary and recent-turn prioritization.
answeredQuestions.scope-boundaries: In scope: conversation metadata, prompt assembly, summarization, persistence, tests. Out of scope: cross-conversation memory and cloud sync.
answeredQuestions.success-metrics: Coherence retention, reduced prompt token usage, stable long-thread response latency.
answeredQuestions.nfr-targets: Reliability, privacy-safe diagnostics, migration safety, and bounded processing overhead.

referencesProcessed.keyFindings: Current local-first Electron architecture and provider flow constraints.
Recommended context budgeting and rolling summary strategy.

nextActions: Confirm acceptance thresholds and provider-specific context defaults
Confirm synchronous versus asynchronous summarization for V1
